criteria.description: Every conclusion is grounded in the exact Structure rows snapshot or explicit ordered export.
The answer explicitly distinguishes selected rows including the root, issue-row occurrences, unique issue identities, repeated occurrences, selectors, exported identities, and omitted identities.
A missing exported identity remains explicit instead of becoming a false absence claim about the Structure plan.
The response covers exact root selection, repeated rows, unique identities, missing identity, and export ordering.
The structured answer avoids copying unrelated Structure or issue data.
